audit_metadata.methodology: Attacker Simulation - 5 attack classes per input

vulnerabilities.title: Unauthenticated Direct Creator Data Access via /api/creator?id=<UUID>
vulnerabilities.description: The GET /api/creator endpoint accepts an arbitrary creator ID without verifying the requesting user owns that creator record. An unauthenticated attacker can enumerate all creator UUIDs and read their confidential performance data, email addresses, and performance metrics.

attack_scenario.name: Creator Data Enumeration Attack
steps: Attacker discovers first creator UUID via public join form or error messages
Attacker iterates UUID space or uses common patterns to enumerate valid creator IDs
Attacker extracts creator profile, monthly GMV, tier, email, content metrics

impact_assessment.data_exposure: All creator metrics, commissions, email addresses, performance data exposed
impact_assessment.business_impact: Competitive intelligence leak, creator privacy violation, potential blackmail material
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: No authentication check + direct UUID parameter = trivial enumeration of entire creator database

code_trace.root_cause: Middleware authenticates presence of session but does NOT validate creator ownership in API route

fix.description: Add authentication and ownership verification before returning creator data

vulnerabilities.title: No Input Validation on Search Parameters in /api/creators - PostgREST Injection Risk
vulnerabilities.description: The /api/creators endpoint uses raw search parameter values directly in Supabase .or() filters without sanitization. A malicious search query can inject PostgREST operators to bypass filters or enumerate all data.

attack_scenario.name: PostgREST Filter Injection Attack
steps: Attacker crafts malicious search parameter with PostgREST operators
Injected operator modifies query logic to return all records
Attacker extracts full creator database without respecting pagination

impact_assessment.data_exposure: Bypasses tier/status/source filters; attacker can enumerate all creators
impact_assessment.business_impact: Confidential business relationships and partnership details exposed
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Direct filter injection + no input validation = query logic manipulation

code_trace.root_cause: Template literal with unsanitized search parameter in PostgREST operator

fix.description: Validate search parameter against allowlist, limit special characters

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Authentication on /api/referrals?action=leaderboard - Unrestricted Data Access
vulnerabilities.description: The /api/referrals endpoint allows unauthenticated GET requests with ?action=leaderboard. An attacker can request the referral leaderboard without authentication, exposing all creator referral performance data.

attack_scenario.name: Leaderboard Data Harvesting
steps: Attacker sends GET request to /api/referrals?action=leaderboard without authentication
API returns top referrers with earned bonuses and referred creator counts
Attacker maps high-earner creators and builds competitive intelligence

impact_assessment.data_exposure: Leaderboard showing all creator referral stats, bonus earnings, referred user counts
impact_assessment.business_impact: Exposes performance-based incentive structure and competitor analysis data
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Zero authentication + sensitive business metrics = trivial unauthorized access

code_trace.root_cause: GET endpoint has no authentication guard. Middleware may not protect /api/referrals

fix.description: Add authentication check at start of GET handler

vulnerabilities.title: Sync API Weak Bearer Token Authentication - Timing Attack Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: The /api/sync endpoint authenticates Cron requests via string equality comparison. This is vulnerable to timing attacks allowing attackers to brute-force the CRON_SECRET.

attack_scenario.name: Sync API Token Brute Force via Timing Attack
steps: Attacker sends POST /api/sync with Bearer token guess
String equality check returns false in microseconds if first char wrong
Attacker times response and narrows character space with each request
After sufficient requests, attacker derives CRON_SECRET and triggers expensive sync operations

impact_assessment.resource_impact: Third-party API overages (Apify, TikTok Shop), database compute exhaustion
impact_assessment.business_impact: Significant API costs, rate limiting, service degradation
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Weak auth mechanism + expensive operations = resource abuse vector

code_trace.root_cause: String equality comparison vulnerable to timing attacks

vulnerabilities.title: No Owner Verification in /api/samples and /api/outreach PATCH - Cross-Creator Modification
vulnerabilities.description: The PATCH endpoints for sample_shipments and outreach_pipeline accept arbitrary shipment IDs without verifying the requesting user owns the associated creator. An authenticated user can modify any creator's records.

attack_scenario.name: Cross-Creator Data Modification
steps: Attacker obtains another creator's shipment UUID via enumeration
Attacker sends PATCH /api/samples with modified status, cost, tracking data
Attacker marks competitors' samples as 'content_posted' to inflate metrics
Competitor's commission calculations and tier progression becomes incorrect

impact_assessment.data_integrity: Competitor shipment statuses altered, commission calculations corrupted
impact_assessment.business_impact: Unfair tier progression, commission disputes, data integrity violations
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Authenticated attacker can modify any shipment + no owner checks = cross-creator abuse

code_trace.root_cause: Service role client allows unrestricted updates without ownership verification

fix.description: Add owner verification before PATCH: verify creator_accounts.creator_id matches shipment.creator_id

vulnerabilities.title: No Authentication on /api/reminders GET - Reminder Stats Enumeration
vulnerabilities.description: The GET /api/reminders endpoint returns shipment statistics without authentication. An attacker can enumerate reminder pipeline status across all creators.

attack_scenario.name: Reminder Pipeline Reconnaissance
steps: Attacker sends GET /api/reminders without authorization
API returns counts of shipments in each status: delivered, reminder_1, reminder_2
Attacker infers business process flow and creator engagement rates

impact_assessment.data_exposure: Reminder workflow statistics and shipment pipeline metrics exposed
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Unauthenticated access to business process metrics

code_trace.root_cause: GET handler has no authentication check

fix.description: Add authentication check at start of GET handler

vulnerabilities.title: Integer Overflow in Pagination - Denial of Service
vulnerabilities.description: The limit and page parameters in /api/creators, /api/samples, and /api/outreach are converted to integers without validation. An attacker can send extremely large values causing memory exhaustion or query timeouts.

attack_scenario.name: Query DoS via Pagination Bombs
steps: Attacker sends /api/creators?limit=2147483647&page=2147483647
Integer multiplication (offset = (page-1) * limit) causes huge allocation
Database query attempts to fetch billions of rows, exhausting memory

impact_assessment.resource_impact: Memory exhaustion, database CPU spike, service unavailability
impact_assessment.business_impact: DoS condition, legitimate users unable to access API
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Arithmetic overflow + unvalidated pagination = trivial DoS

code_trace.root_cause: No bounds checking on limit and page parameters

vulnerabilities.title: Unvalidated Object Spread in POST /api/creators - Arbitrary Field Injection
vulnerabilities.description: The POST /api/creators endpoint accepts and directly inserts the entire request body without validation. An attacker can inject arbitrary fields into the creators table.

attack_scenario.name: Creator Record Field Injection
steps: Attacker sends POST /api/creators with malicious fields
Attacker injects tier='diamond', commission_rate=99.99, monthly_gmv=999999
Attacker creates fake diamond-tier creator with elevated commissions

impact_assessment.data_integrity: Fake creator records, incorrect commission rates, tier fraud
impact_assessment.business_impact: Commission payout errors, false performance metrics
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: No field whitelisting + direct insert = field injection vulnerability

code_trace.root_cause: Entire request body inserted without field validation

fix.description: Use zod schema to validate and whitelist allowed fields before insert

vulnerabilities.title: Missing CSRF Protection on State-Changing Operations
vulnerabilities.description: POST/PATCH endpoints do not implement CSRF tokens. A cross-site request from a malicious website can trigger creator modifications or sample shipment updates.

attack_scenario.name: CSRF Attack on Sample Shipment Update
steps: Admin logs into dashboard.banilaco.com in Browser Tab 1
Admin visits attacker.com in Browser Tab 2
Attacker.com contains hidden form: POST /api/samples with status='no_response'
Shipment record updated due to valid session cookie from Tab 1

impact_assessment.data_integrity: Unauthorized modifications to shipments and creator records
impact_assessment.business_impact: Commission calculation errors, creator trust damage
impact_assessment.severity_rationale: No CSRF tokens + cookie-based auth = cross-site attack surface

code_trace.root_cause: PATCH/POST endpoints rely on auth headers but do not implement CSRF tokens

fix.description: Add CSRF token validation middleware for state-changing operations

vulnerabilities.title: Error Messages Leak Internal Structure Information
vulnerabilities.description: API error responses include detailed Supabase error messages that reveal database schema and column structures, aiding attackers in crafting targeted attacks.

attack_scenario.name: Schema Discovery via Error Messages
steps: Attacker sends PATCH to /api/samples with invalid field name
Error response includes: 'column fake_field does not exist'
Attacker iterates possible column names to map full schema

impact_assessment.severity_rationale: Low severity but reduces attack surface

code_trace.root_cause: Error messages from Supabase passed directly to client

fix.description: Sanitize error responses: log actual error, return generic message to client

summary.risk_assessment: CRITICAL - Multiple unauthenticated data access vulnerabilities combined with weak authorization checks enable trivial enumeration and modification of sensitive creator data. Immediate remediation required before production deployment.
